name: MP5-SD | 协处理器
descriptionEn: Often imitated but never equaled, the iconic MP5 is perhaps the most versatile and popular SMG in the world. This SD variant features an integrated silencer, making an already formidable weapon whisper-quiet. A blue circuit board pattern been applied. Silently supplementing
descriptionZh: 一直被模仿，但从未被超越。经典的 MP5 也许是世界上用法最通用、最受欢迎的微型冲锋枪。此 SD 变种最大特点在于已配有消音器，本已令人胆寒的武器如今杀人于无声之间。 这把武器采用了蓝色电路板图案。 默默补充
